name: Inquiro RNA SDK
postCreateCommand: python3 -m pip install --user 'uv' && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && cd ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/mock && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
postStartCommand: export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && cd ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/mock && nohup uv run python mock_server.py > /tmp/mock_rna.log 2>&1 & sleep 3 && echo '=== Testing mock server ===' && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":"1","method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | python3 -m json.tool && echo '' && echo '=== Mock server ready. Endpoint: http://localhost:8000/mcp ===' && echo '=== Live endpoint: https://aiflightrecorder.onrender.com/mcp ==='
